summary: A recorded Real America's Voice remote interview, posted by the USCIS Director. It opens on a two-box layout: at left, an exterior storefront shot of a 'U.S. CITIZENSHIP & IMMIGRATION SERVICES' office sign, and at right the Director joining by video in glasses, a dark suit and a yellow tie. A 'Just the News, No Noise' bug appears and a lower-third chyron reads 'DIRECTOR JOSEPH EDLOW / Director, USCIS' over a scrolling headline ticker. The narration concerns screening and vetting standards in the immigration system. The audio is broadcast interview speech.

script.scene: Two-box layout: exterior shot of a 'U.S. CITIZENSHIP & IMMIGRATION SERVICES' office sign at left, the Director by video at right in a dark suit and yellow tie; chyron 'DIRECTOR JOSEPH EDLOW / Director, USCIS'; 'Just the News, No Noise' bug.
The Director's feed as he continues speaking; headline ticker along the bottom.

notable_text: U.S. CITIZENSHIP & IMMIGRATION SERVICES; DIRECTOR JOSEPH EDLOW; Director, USCIS; Just the News, No Noise
